description.ko: 해부된 흑백 신호가 날카로운 검사 패널로 파열되며, 빠른 혼돈을 정밀한 기하학적 균형 안에 붙잡는다.
description.en: A dissected monochrome signal fractures into sharp inspection panes, holding fast chaos in exact geometric balance.

prompt: KURO-X piece titled "Vector Static Inquest": a severe black and white geometric glitch abstraction arranged as a forensic cross-section of corrupted motion, where the image is sliced into staggered inspection panes rather than built around any figure, logo, text, sculpture, sphere, cube, monolith, or single hero object. Matte #1A1A1A polygonal strata press against hard #FFFFFF evidence gaps, while #808080 and #C0C0C0 shards form jagged measuring brackets, fractured triangular rulers, offset diamond fragments, slanted register windows, and snapped angular contour lines. The composition feels like a monochrome signal being dissected mid-refresh: pane edges jump by different frame intervals, narrow black wedges invade white voids, gray facets stutter forward, and every broken fragment still locks into a precise hidden geometry. Fine horizontal scanlines run across the entire surface, interrupted by luma tearing, grayscale alias bands, hard square compression debris, severed calibration notches, micro static flecks, and medium-density angular particles. High contrast, crisp vector edges, fast visual acceleration, intense mechanical tension, sharp angles, monochrome complexity, chaos contained inside exact fragmented balance.
